use_cases: Quick navigation to app sections via keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K)
Executing system commands like theme toggling and settings access
Searching and filtering through available commands and features
Accessing recently used commands with history persistence
ai_summary: A keyboard-driven command palette component with search, category filtering, and command history tracking. Features Framer Motion animations, localStorage persistence for recent commands, and AI prompt integration. Opens via Cmd+K shortcut and supports keyboard navigation for quick app navigation and command execution in modern SaaS and productivity applications.
